# TeamsNotificationJobComponent

Send a message to a Microsoft Teams channel via incoming webhook.

## Dependencies
- `requests`

## What this is
A **Dagster job** (no asset materialized) — the component installs a `dg.job`
plus an optional schedule. Lineage graph stays clean; the work happens
behind the scenes.

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json) · [Example config](example.yaml)

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `title` | `str` | Message title |
| `text` | `str` | Message body (Markdown) |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tags` | `dict` | — | Dagster job tags |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron schedule (None = no schedule) |
| `webhook_url_env` | `str` | `"TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL"` | Env var with Teams incoming-webhook URL |
| `theme_color` | `str` | `"0076D7"` | Hex color for the card stripe |
